title: Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila
tagline: Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila, Kerala

overview.short: Vadakkan Koyikkal temple, a Devi temple or Bhagavathi temple near Kayamkulam, is situated in Puthiyavila village, Alappuzha in Kerala.
overview.description: Vadakkan Koyikkal temple, a Devi temple or Bhagavathi temple near Kayamkulam, is situated in Puthiyavila village, Alappuzha in Kerala. Sree Parvathy Devi is mainly worshiped in the temple. The other main idols of this temple are lord Shiva, Bhadrakaali and Sree Dharma Shastav. Idols of Naga devada, Khandakarna, Yekshi, Yogishwara and Brahmarakshas are also worshiped in this temple.

topPlaces.name: Muthukulam
topPlaces.description: Muthukulam is a backwater village and census town near Haripad in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a major village between Kayamkulam and Haripad and headquarters of the Muthukulam Block Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kayamkulam Kayal
topPlaces.description: Kayamkulam Kayal, Kayamkulam Lake or Kayamkulam Estuary is a shallow brackish water lagoon stretching between Panmana and Karthikapally. It has an outlet to the Arabian sea at Kayamkulam barrage.

topPlaces.name: Kandalloor
topPlaces.description: Kandalloor is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Ramapuram, Alappuzha
topPlaces.description: Ramapuram is a small village in Kayamkulam in the Karthikappally Taluk of Alappuzha district in Kerala, India. Famous film actress K. P. A. C. Lalitha was born in Ramapuram.

topPlaces.name: Kareelakulangara
topPlaces.description: Kareelakulangara is a small neighbourhood situated in Pathiyoor village of Alappuzha district of Kerala state of India. National Highway NH47 passes through this junction.

topPlaces.name: Keerikkad
topPlaces.description: Keerikkad (Town) is a suburban region in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. Keerikkad is a rapidly growing town with a tranquil and serene atmosphere.

topPlaces.name: Kannamangalam (Alappuzha)
topPlaces.description: Kannamangalam is a village in Mavelikkara Taluk in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies in Chettikulangara Grama Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Thekkekara, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Thekkekara is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.The village is situated in Mavelikara South.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila?
faq.a: Stays in Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila?
faq.a: The top attractions are Muthukulam, Kayamkulam Kayal, Kandalloor, Ramapuram, Alappuzha, Kareelakulangara.
